topics.title: Scientists map the brain’s hidden wiring using RNA barcodes in major breakthrough
topics.summary: Perfekt für Galileo: Wissenschaft trifft Entertainment. Researchers have developed a cutting-edge technique that uses RNA “barcodes” to map how neurons connect, capturing thousands of links with single-synapse precision. The method transforms brain mapping
topics.visualReason: Begrenzte visuelle Möglichkeiten, hauptsächlich Interviews
